evals.prompt: Evaluate the structure of my skill at .agents/skills/my-skill/
evals.expected_output: The agent runs the check_structure.py script or manually checks: SKILL.md exists, evals/evals.json exists and is valid JSON, no nested duplicates, eval cases have required fields. Reports PASS/NEEDS_WORK/FAIL.
assertions: The agent checks for SKILL.md existence
The agent reports a verdict (PASS, NEEDS_WORK, or FAIL)

evals.prompt: Run a live evaluation of the triz-solver skill using one of its eval prompts
evals.expected_output: The agent loads the triz-solver skill, runs one eval prompt through it, grades the output against assertions with evidence, and provides a verdict.
assertions: The agent loads the target skill
The agent runs a representative eval prompt
The agent grades against assertions with evidence
The agent provides a clear verdict

evals.prompt: Compare the triz-analysis skill with and without the skill loaded (baseline comparison)
evals.expected_output: The agent runs the same prompt twice: once with the skill loaded, once without. Compares pass rate, missing details, format compliance.
assertions: The agent runs the same prompt with and without the skill
The agent reports differences in output quality

evals.prompt: Is the assertion 'The output is good' a valid eval assertion?
evals.expected_output: The agent identifies this as a BAD assertion - too subjective. Good assertions are concrete and checkable like 'The answer cites the exact minimum cover dimensions'.
assertions: The agent identifies the assertion as subjective/invalid
The agent explains that assertions must be concrete and checkable
The agent provides an example of a good assertion

evals.prompt: My skill at .agents/skills/epub-validation/ has no evals directory. What should I add?
evals.expected_output: The agent explains what evals/evals.json should contain: an array of eval cases with id, prompt, expected_output, files, and assertions fields. Provides guidance on realistic prompts and concrete assertions.
assertions: The agent explains the evals.json structure
The agent mentions required fields (id, prompt, expected_output)
The agent explains assertions should be concrete and checkable
